## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Implementation complete
- [ ] Validation added (frontend + backend where applicable)
- [ ] Swagger `@swagger` JSDoc block added/updated (backend endpoints only)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars introduced
- [ ] At least one test written covering the new functionality
- [ ] PR opened targeting `develop` with `Closes #<this-issue-number>`
